en: Hello everyone. Here we go.
A: Please stand up! Salute!
B: Hello.
A: Please sit down.

ab: akokey kamo, o ko ipanci sicyarow ya ciriciring no tao am, kanekanen.
ch: 大家好。今天老師要教大家食物的達悟語怎麼說。
en: A: Hello everyone. Today I’m going to teach you how to say food in Tao.
A: Do you understand what I’m saying?

ab: ko jiatenngi, apya ipisa mo pa ipanci?
ch: B:我不懂。可以再說一次嗎?
en: B: I don’t understand. Can you repeat it?

ab: makaciak ka, ta ko jia mizing?
ch: B:我聽不到，可以大聲一點嗎?
en: B: I can’t hear you, can you speak louder?

ab: cita do jia! tobwohen mo o ciring ko.
ch: 請看這裡! 跟著我唸一遍。
en: Look here, please! Repeat after me.
It’s very well read.
Read it again. Please speak louder.
Please be quiet. Don’t talk.
A: Please take out your textbook.
B: Yes.
A: Please take out your pen.
B: I forgot to bring my pen.
A: Please take out the eraser.
B: I forgot to bring my eraser.

ab: vood pa do katangked mo o ipangongopas na.
ch: A:請跟旁邊同學借橡皮擦。
en: A: Please borrow erasers from your classmates.

ab: vooden ko pa o ipangongopas mo an?
en: B: Can I borrow your eraser?
Class is over.

ab: maminda do jia o pacinanaoan niyo.
en: Class dismissed.
